Name: MOD-Home-HomeDashboard-Functional: Verify profile dropdown opens and displays correct user information and navigation options
Precondition: User is logged in as System Admin on the Home page.
Objective: To verify the profile dropdown displays the correct user name and email and provides 'Profile' and 'Sign Out' links.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Login page is displayed.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter login email in the 'Email' field
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Email value is populated.
Password is entered.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Sign in" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is redirected to the Home page.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click profile avatar button in the top system bar
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Profile dropdown menu opens.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify user display name 'System Admin1' is shown at the top of the dropdown
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User display name 'System Admin1' is visible at the top of the profile dropdown.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify user email address is shown in the dropdown
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Email 'mshinde+uisa1@diligent.com' is displayed below the user name in the dropdown.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify 'Profile' link is visible in the dropdown
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'Profile' link is visible in the dropdown menu.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify 'Sign Out' link is visible in the dropdown
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link name="Sign Out" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'Sign Out' link is visible in the dropdown menu.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link name="Sign Out" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is redirected to the login page.
